summary: Iteration 14: Mobile viewport (400x800) testing for calendar features. All 5 features PASSED. Booking calendar shows availability colors (red/pink=booked, green=free, grey=past) with legend. Client agenda calendar shows hours (HH:MM - HH:MM) with clock icon. Admin calendar grid fits mobile screen with proper CSS grid layout. Admin event cards display clock icons with HH:MM times. Admin event detail modal shows departure and return times in HH:MM format.

test_1_client_booking_calendar_availabil.details: MiniCalendar shows legend with 'Occupé' (red dot), 'Libre' (green dot), 'Passé' (grey dot). Booked dates (Feb 25-28) display with pink/red background. Free future dates show green background. Calendar modal fits mobile screen.

test_2_client_agenda_hours.details: Client reservations calendar view shows event cards with clock icon and '08:00 - 18:00' time format in purple text. Navigated to October 2026, clicked Oct 15, event card displayed: 'Volkswagen Golf', times '08:00 - 18:00', '15 oct. - 18 oct. 2026', '3 jours', 'CHF 195.00'.

test_3_admin_calendar_mobile_layout.details: Admin calendar at /admin/calendar displays properly on mobile with CSS grid. 7-column layout (Lun-Dim) fits within 400px viewport. Month navigation, legend (Départ, Retour, Retard, En cours), and day cells with event badges all visible.

test_4_admin_event_hours.details: Clicked on Feb 26. Départs section shows 'Mercedes Sprinter' with clock icon and '07:46' in blue text. Retours section shows 'Volkswagen Golf' with clock icon and '17:00' in purple text. Event cards correctly display times in HH:MM format.

test_5_admin_event_detail_modal_hours.details: Clicked on Mercedes Sprinter event. Detail modal shows 'Détail de la réservation' with: DÉPART '26 févr. 2026' and '07:46' (blue), RETOUR '03 mars 2026' and '07:46' (purple). Both departure and return times displayed in HH:MM format.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile 400x800 calendar testing complete. All calendar components (MiniCalendar, Admin Calendar, Client Agenda Calendar) work correctly on mobile: 1) Booking calendar shows availability with colored backgrounds and legend, 2) Client agenda shows hours with clock icon in HH:MM - HH:MM format, 3) Admin calendar uses responsive CSS grid that fits 400px viewport, 4) Admin event cards show clock icon with HH:MM times in colored text, 5) Admin detail modal shows both departure and return times under date fields.
